/usr/bin/ar qc libprifhete.a CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/state/plaintext_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/protocol/key_generation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/protocol/registration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/protocol/mint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/protocol/transfer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/protocol/process_transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/protocol/update_ciphertext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/proof/proof_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/fhe/circuits.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/fhe/binfhe_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/wkenc/wkenc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/commit/commitment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/prf/prf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prifhete.dir/src/merkle/merkle_tree.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libprifhete.a
